description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and logs into the GitLab Container Registry before each job. Define a single stage named build. Add a build job that runs on all branches except master, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG". Add a build-master job that runs only on the master branch, executing docker build --pull -t "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE" . and docker push "$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE". Both jobs inherit the before_script login step.
